evals.prompt: Polish this MusicXML score with the moderate style preset. Export Bach Chorale BWV 84.3 from music21's corpus as the test input.
evals.expected_output: polished.musicxml + polished.pdf + original.pdf + before-after.pdf + changes.json + residual_issues.json + dorico-instructions.md + sibelius-instructions.md. Content changes should be zero or near-zero (style-only re-engrave preserves music).
assertions: All 8 output files exist in the output directory
polished.pdf opens as a valid PDF
residual_issues.json total is reasonable (likely 0 for a clean Bach chorale)

evals.prompt: A user exported MusicXML from Dorico with tight spacing and collisions. Polish with the strict preset.
evals.expected_output: All outputs present. before-after.pdf should show visible spacing improvements. residual_issues.json may flag missing tempos or cues.
assertions: before-after.pdf has the same page count as the input
changes.json total is small (style polish shouldn't change content)

evals.prompt: Only a PDF is available. Polish it using Audiveris OMR fallback.
evals.expected_output: Audiveris auto-installs if missing, extracts MusicXML, polish proceeds. Output warns about OMR transcription uncertainty.
assertions: Audiveris.app exists in ~/Applications or /Applications after run
OMR warning is visible in output
